title: Add post-publish access help and ensure generated template assets are present

requirements.text: Add a user-facing “Trouble opening the app?” help entry point on the unauthenticated landing screen (AuthGate) that explains the “Canister ID Not Resolved” gateway error and provides clear troubleshooting steps in English.
acceptanceCriteria: On the AuthGate screen, users can open a help section/modal titled “Trouble opening the app?”
Help content includes the exact error name “Canister ID Not Resolved” and explains it as a gateway/domain resolution issue (not a user data loss issue).
Help content lists at least: try incognito/private window, try different browser, try different network (mobile data vs Wi‑Fi), and try again later.
All help text is in English.

requirements.text: Provide a built-in “Copy app link” action and display the current hostname + full origin (protocol + host) so users can share the exact published URL they are using.
acceptanceCriteria: AuthGate includes a “Copy app link” button that copies window.location.origin to the clipboard and shows a success toast.
The UI displays the current host (e.g., student-reflection-poster-generator.icp0.io) near the copy button so the user can visually verify the domain.
If clipboard copy fails, an error toast is shown and the user is still able to manually select the displayed URL text.

requirements.text: Add an authenticated navigation location (e.g., in the AppLayout footer) to open the same “Trouble opening the app?” help content so signed-in users can access it too.
acceptanceCriteria: AppLayout footer contains a link/button labeled “Trouble opening the app?”
Clicking the link opens the same help content used on AuthGate (no duplicated/inconsistent instructions).

requirements.text: Ensure all generated static image assets referenced by the template catalog and branding are included in the build output under frontend/public/assets/generated and load without 404s in the published app.
acceptanceCriteria: The following files exist at runtime and load successfully: /assets/generated/template-paper.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/template-geo.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/template-campus.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/template-grid.dim_1600x2000.png, /assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png.
TemplateGallery previews render images without broken-image placeholders.
AppLayout header logo renders without broken-image placeholders.

constraints: Do not edit any files under frontend/src/components/ui (Shadcn UI sources must be composed, not modified).
Do not modify immutable hook files: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx.
Keep backend as a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo; do not introduce additional backend services.
nonGoals: Implementing or changing ICP gateway/domain mapping at the infrastructure level (DNS, boundary nodes, custom domain settings).
Adding third-party monitoring, analytics, or external status-page integrations.

required: Academic poster template background with subtle paper texture and warm neutral palette (template-paper.dim_1600x2000.png)
Minimal geometric academic poster background with light tan and charcoal accents (template-geo.dim_1600x2000.png)
Photo-less campus-inspired abstract background with soft greens and off-white (template-campus.dim_1600x2000.png)
Modern monochrome poster background with clean grid lines and beige highlights (template-grid.dim_1600x2000.png)
App logo mark: simple bookmark + spark icon in dark charcoal on transparent background (logo-mark.dim_512x512.png)

preferencesToAdd: Use English for all user-facing text.
